title: CRITIQUE output — verdict + blocking issues list (00-aprd phase)

aprd_ref.description: path to the aPRD draft or frozen version reviewed

issues.description: blocking-grade only; empty array on a clean draft

id.description: stable issue id; I* contiguous from I1

category.description: issue category; exactly one enum value

target_ref.description: primary artifact id the issue concerns (R*, AC*, A*, G*, OUT_OF_SCOPE)

problem.description: defect and why it blocks freeze; cites concrete ids

fix_hint.description: concrete actionable change SYNTHESIZE should make to clear this issue
